summary: Comprehensive testing of Archéologie des Compétences and Savoir-faire/Savoir-être distinction. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new UI elements verified working - Compétences tab with nature distribution bar, Add competence dialog with nature toggle buttons (savoir-faire/savoir-être), Archéologie tab with hierarchy model and 6 Vertus cards.

console_warnings.issue: React setState warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component
console_warnings.impact: No functional impact, cosmetic console warning only

backend_api: GET /api/referentiel/archeologie - returns vertus (6), valeurs (11), filieres (14), savoir_etre_map (18)
GET /api/referentiel/filieres - returns 14 filieres with id and name
GET /api/referentiel/vertus - returns 6 vertus and 11 valeurs with proper structure
POST /api/passport/competences with nature='savoir_faire' - competence persisted with correct nature
POST /api/passport/competences with nature='savoir_etre' - competence persisted with correct nature
POST /api/passport/competences without nature - defaults to empty string
GET /api/passport/archeologie - returns chains and summary with savoir_faire/savoir_etre split
GET /api/passport/archeologie - chains include competence, qualites, valeurs, vertus
GET /api/passport/diagnostic - includes nature_distribution (savoir_faire, savoir_etre, non_classee counts)
GET /api/passport/diagnostic - generates recommendation for unclassified competences
frontend_ui: Passport view loads with 7 tabs: Profil, Compétences, Évaluation, Archéologie, Émergentes, Expériences, Passerelles
Compétences tab shows nature distribution bar with Savoir-faire and Savoir-être counts
Compétences tab groups competences: savoir-faire section, savoir-être section, non classées section
Add competence dialog has nature selection toggle buttons (data-testid='nature-savoir-faire', 'nature-savoir-etre')
Add competence dialog shows nature labels: 'Savoir-faire - Hard Skill technique', 'Savoir-être - Soft Skill comportemental'
Archéologie tab displays hierarchy model: Métier → Savoir-faire → Savoir-être → Qualités → Valeurs → Vertus
Archéologie tab shows 'Le modèle RE'ACTIF PRO' card with visual hierarchy flow
Archéologie tab has 'Analyser mon profil' button (data-testid='load-archeologie-btn')
Archéologie tab shows summary stats: Savoir-faire count, Savoir-être count, Valeurs couvertes, Vertus activées
Archéologie tab displays warning for non-classified competences
Archéologie tab shows 6 Vertus cards: Sagesse, Courage, Humanité, Justice, Tempérance, Transcendance
Each Vertu card shows description, qualités associées, and savoir-être linked

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Archéologie and nature distinction elements verified)

seed_data_creation: Passport auto-created on GET /api/passport. Referentiel data (vertus, valeurs, filieres, savoir_etre_map) is static in server.py.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - anonymous authentication. Use POST /api/auth/anonymous with {role: 'particulier'} to get token. IMPORTANT: Must call GET /api/passport first to create passport before adding competences.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Archéologie des Compétences and Savoir-faire/Savoir-être distinction fully tested. Backend: GET /api/referentiel/archeologie returns vertus (6), valeurs (11), filieres (14), savoir_etre_map (18). POST /api/passport/competences accepts nature field (savoir_faire/savoir_etre). GET /api/passport/archeologie returns chains with qualites/valeurs/vertus mapping. GET /api/passport/diagnostic includes nature_distribution counts. Frontend: Compétences tab shows nature distribution bar and groups competences by nature. Add competence dialog has nature toggle buttons. Archéologie tab shows hierarchy model, 'Analyser mon profil' button, summary stats, and 6 Vertus cards with associated qualités and savoir-être.

features_verified.referentiel_archeologie: ✓ Returns 6 vertus, 11 valeurs, 14 filieres, 18 savoir_etre mappings
features_verified.referentiel_filieres: ✓ Returns 14 filieres with id and name
features_verified.referentiel_vertus: ✓ Returns 6 vertus and 11 valeurs with full structure (qualites, savoirs_etre)
features_verified.ui_nature_distribution_bar: ✓ Shows Savoir-faire/Savoir-être counts with visual bar
features_verified.ui_competence_grouping: ✓ Groups competences by nature (savoir-faire, savoir-être, non classées)
features_verified.ui_add_competence_nature_toggle: ✓ Dialog has Savoir-faire and Savoir-être toggle buttons
features_verified.ui_archeologie_hierarchy: ✓ Shows hierarchy: Métier → Savoir-faire → Savoir-être → Qualités → Valeurs → Vertus
features_verified.ui_archeologie_6_vertus: ✓ Displays 6 Vertus cards (Sagesse, Courage, Humanité, Justice, Tempérance, Transcendance)
features_verified.ui_analyze_profil_button: ✓ 'Analyser mon profil' button loads archeologie data and displays chains
